description: Accounts in the hand of Nissim b. Ḥalfon, presented to Nahray b. Nissim; 1066 CE. Lists payments for various goods, made either directly or through others, and gives details of various shipments, some of them to Tripoli, Libya. Mentions skins, textiles, beads, sugar, red wood, ammonia, furs, lead, baked goods, wine, meat, camphor, wax, tin, cloves, pearls and lac. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, p. 986.)
tags: sugar, laque, wine, libya, tin, skins, wax, lead, ammonia, account, furs, beads, clove, pearls, camphor, meat, textiles, red wood, Nahray B. Nissim
description_he: חשבונות בכתב ניסים בן חלפון לנהראי בן ניסים, 1066, תשלומים עבור סחורות ממוגרב ואחר
